grants.name: Google.org Impact Challenge: AI for Science

eligibility.restrictions: Researchers, nonprofits, social enterprises, academic institutions globally

grants.notes: Extended deadline from April 17; provides funding and technical expertise; $30M global open call

grants.name: Google.org Impact Challenge: AI for Government Innovation

eligibility.restrictions: Government agencies, nonprofits working with governments, public sector organizations

grants.notes: $30M global allocation; recipients get Google mentorship and AI expertise

grants.name: Meta AI Glasses Impact Grants
grants.notes: $2M total allocation; notification date May 31, 2026; includes accelerator and standard grant paths

grants.name: Amazon Research Awards (ARA) - Spring 2026

eligibility.restrictions: Academic researchers, universities, research institutions, 8+ countries

grants.notes: Seven distinct research tracks; recipients get AWS AI credits plus unrestricted funding; no use restrictions

grants.name: Microsoft Research Fellowship 2026

eligibility.restrictions: PhD students, faculty researchers, postdocs globally

grants.notes: Deadline passed (2025); 2026 awards already notified; includes travel funding for on-site collaboration | CORRECTED: Fellowship programs recur annually; expect 2026-2027 cycle ~Dec 2026

grants.name: Microsoft AI Economy Institute - AIEI Open Call 3
grants.notes: Award notifications April 2026; research April-Nov 2026; in-person workshop Oct 2026; book publication component

grants.name: OpenAI AI Mental Health Research Grants

eligibility.restrictions: Researchers, organizations working on mental health

grants.notes: Deadline passed (Jan 2026); highly competitive (1000+ applications); award notifications in progress

grants.name: OpenAI EMEA Youth & Wellbeing Grant

eligibility.restrictions: NGOs and research organizations in Europe, Middle East, Africa

grants.notes: Pilots Q2 2026; implementation support provided; deadline passed but pilots ongoing

grants.name: OpenAI Independent AI Alignment Research Grants

eligibility.restrictions: Independent researchers, research organizations focused on AI alignment

grants.notes: Supports research outside traditional institutions; recent launch Feb 2026; explicit focus on independent teams

grants.name: OpenAI Cybersecurity Grant Program (Evolved)
grants.notes: Program revised/evolved as of Feb 5, 2026; check current guidelines for updates

grants.name: NVIDIA Academic Grant Program - AI Training & Model Development

eligibility.restrictions: Academic researchers, PhD students, universities globally

grants.notes: Includes access to computing resources; collaboration with NVIDIA researchers; rolling admissions

grants.name: NVIDIA Graduate Fellowship (2026-2027 Academic Year)

eligibility.restrictions: Full-time PhD students (must be enrolled during 9-month award period)

grants.notes: Annual competitive fellowship; includes mentorship; cannot graduate during award period

grants.name: Reid Hoffman Foundation - Hoffman-Yee Research Grants

eligibility.restrictions: Stanford research teams, collaborative research programs

grants.notes: Focuses on bold ideas in AI; multi-million annually; 2026 cycle not yet announced; previous cycles show strong AI focus

grants.name: Bezos Earth Fund
grants.notes: $10B commitment; may fund AI applications for climate research; ongoing calls

grants.name: Linux Foundation - $12.5M Open Source Security Grants
grants.notes: Announced March 17, 2026; $12.5M from leading organizations; OCUDU Ecosystem Foundation March 1, 2026

grants.name: Linux Foundation - LiFT (Training) Scholarship

eligibility.restrictions: Individuals pursuing open source careers; global; emphasis on underrepresented communities

grants.notes: 16 different scholarship categories; training focus; April 1, 2026 applications opening

grants.name: CNCF (Cloud Native Computing Foundation) Education Grants
grants.notes: 2026 Application Guidelines available; Dan Kohn Scholarship also available for events

grants.name: IEEE CIS Graduate Student Research Grants

eligibility.restrictions: Graduate students at IEEE member institutions

grants.notes: 2026 applications now open; support for emerging researchers; IEEE publications encouraged

grants.name: IEEE EPICS in IEEE - Community Service Grants
grants.notes: $65k total for 2026; May 1, 2025 deadline for 2026 projects; community impact focus

grants.name: Partnership on AI - Inclusive Research & Design Program
grants.notes: San Francisco-based research; multiple programs available; focus on practical AI governance

grants.name: Faith and AI Rapid Response Grant (DELTA Program)

source.name: Partnership on AI / University of Notre Dame

grants.notes: Rapid turnaround grants; 4-5 month duration April-Sept 2026; focus on faith/AI intersection

grants.name: Anthropic Fellows Program - AI Safety Research

eligibility.restrictions: Researchers interested in AI safety and alignment

grants.notes: Application windows May 2026 and July 2026; recent launch 2026; focus on independent researchers

grants.name: MATS Program (ML Alignment & Theory Scholars)

eligibility.restrictions: Talented scholars interested in AI alignment

grants.notes: Intensive research programs; top mentors in AI safety; global participation; Summer 2026 cohort dates vary

grants.name: Meta Data Center Community Action Grants 2026

eligibility.restrictions: Community organizations near Meta data centers

grants.notes: 2026 recipients announced; focus on data center communities; AI skills emphasis

grants.name: National Science Foundation (NSF) - Multiple Programs (SBIR/STTR, CAREER, GRFP)

eligibility.restrictions: US institutions, faculty, researchers, graduate students, startups

grants.notes: $9B FY2026 budget; multiple pathways (SBIR Phase II: $500K-$1M); highly competitive

grants.name: National AI Research Resource (NAIRR) Pilot Program
grants.notes: Provides computing resources not just cash; focus on broadening participation; pilot phase expanding

grants.name: Google AI Futures Fund (Google Labs)

eligibility.restrictions: Startups, tech companies (part of cohort programming)

grants.notes: Partnership with venture (Accel) for Atoms AI Cohort 2026; technical resources from Google

grants.name: Stripe Grants Program - Research Component
grants.notes: Limited specific details; includes research/developer grant components

grants.name: EU Horizon Europe - HORIZON-CL4 (Digital & AI)
grants.notes: Major European funding; multiple calls throughout 2026; international partnerships encouraged

grants.name: OpenAI Researcher Access Program

eligibility.restrictions: Researchers working on AI safety and responsible development

grants.notes: Provides API access and model credits for research; focus on safety-aligned research

grants.name: ARC Prize 2026
grants.notes: Total prize pool $2M; milestone prizes $75K for open-source solutions; demonstrates gap between AI and human reasoning

grants.name: Caregiver Artificial Intelligence Prize Challenge (HHS)

source.name: U.S. Department of Health and Human Services (HHS)

eligibility.restrictions: Innovators developing AI-enabled caregiving solutions; global

grants.notes: Phase 1 launched Feb 2026; $2M total; focus on responsible AI for home caregiving and direct care workers

grants.name: XPRIZE Wildfire Competition
grants.notes: 4-year competition; $11M total; finalist teams advancing Jan 2026; autonomous firefighting technologies

grants.name: XPRIZE Quantum Applications
grants.notes: Phase II wildcard round opening early 2026; finalists selected; sponsored by Google Quantum AI

grants.name: XPRIZE Rainforest
grants.notes: $10M prize pool; focuses on rapid biodiversity surveying technology in rainforests

grants.name: NeurIPS Competition Track 2026

eligibility.restrictions: Students and researchers globally; varies by competition

grants.notes: Multiple competitions annually; includes travel grants for winners; GPU prizes; complimentary registration

grants.name: Mila AI Policy Fellowship 2026

eligibility.restrictions: Global; professionals from varied backgrounds; policy leaders

source.name: Institute for AI Policy and Strategy (IAPS)

grants.notes: 3-month fellowship June-Aug 2026; $15K stipend; DC-based with remote options; practical policy work

grants.notes: 3-month seasonal fellowship; designed to launch/accelerate careers in AI governance

grants.name: OpenAI Residency 2026

eligibility.restrictions: Researchers and engineers with AI exploration background

grants.notes: 6-month residency; $3,850/week (~$220K/year); San Francisco; includes mentorship; 2026 applications closed
